metadata.name: Antiques
metadata.purpose: Model antique items, their valuations, provenance, and insurance coverage for comprehensive risk assessment
metadata.creator: OAA Generator

entities.name: AntiqueItem
entities.description: A collectible object of historical significance, typically over 100 years old, with artistic or monetary value

properties.name: itemId
properties.description: Unique identifier for the antique item

properties.name: title
properties.description: Descriptive title of the antique item

properties.name: category
properties.description: Category classification such as furniture, ceramics, art, or jewelry

properties.name: period
properties.description: Historical period or era of origin

properties.name: condition
properties.description: Current physical condition rating of the item

properties.name: dimensions
properties.description: Physical dimensions of the item

properties.name: materials
properties.description: Primary materials used in construction

properties.name: dateAcquired
properties.description: Date when the current owner acquired the item

entities.name: Valuation
entities.description: A professional assessment of an antique item's monetary worth for insurance or sale purposes

properties.name: valuationId
properties.description: Unique identifier for the valuation record

properties.name: valuationDate
properties.description: Date when the valuation was conducted

properties.name: marketValue
properties.description: Estimated fair market value in currency

properties.name: replacementValue
properties.description: Cost to replace the item with a comparable piece

properties.name: valuationType
properties.description: Type of valuation such as insurance, estate, or sale

properties.name: validUntil
properties.description: Expiration date of the valuation

entities.name: Appraiser
entities.description: A qualified professional who assesses and certifies the value and authenticity of antique items

properties.name: appraiserId
properties.description: Unique identifier for the appraiser

properties.name: name
properties.description: Full legal name of the appraiser

properties.name: certifications
properties.description: Professional certifications and credentials held

properties.name: specializations
properties.description: Areas of expertise such as furniture, paintings, or porcelain

properties.name: licenseNumber
properties.description: Professional license registration number

properties.name: contactEmail
properties.description: Professional contact email address

entities.name: InsurancePolicy
entities.description: A contract providing financial protection against loss, damage, or theft of insured antique items

properties.name: policyNumber
properties.description: Unique insurance policy reference number

properties.name: policyType
properties.description: Type of coverage such as comprehensive or named perils

properties.name: coverageAmount
properties.description: Maximum coverage amount in currency

properties.name: premium
properties.description: Annual premium cost for the policy

properties.name: deductible
properties.description: Deductible amount per claim

properties.name: effectiveDate
properties.description: Start date of policy coverage

properties.name: expirationDate
properties.description: End date of policy coverage

properties.name: isActive
properties.description: Whether the policy is currently active

entities.name: Owner
entities.description: An individual or organization that legally possesses and holds title to antique items

properties.name: ownerId
properties.description: Unique identifier for the owner

properties.name: name
properties.description: Full legal name of the owner

properties.name: ownerType
properties.description: Type of owner such as individual, estate, or institution

properties.name: contactAddress
properties.description: Primary contact address for correspondence

properties.name: contactPhone
properties.description: Contact telephone number

properties.name: contactEmail
properties.description: Contact email address

entities.name: Provenance
entities.description: The documented history of ownership and custody of an antique item from origin to present

properties.name: provenanceId
properties.description: Unique identifier for the provenance record

properties.name: originDate
properties.description: Earliest known date of the item's existence

properties.name: originLocation
properties.description: Geographic location of origin or creation

properties.name: ownershipHistory
properties.description: Chronological record of previous owners

properties.name: documentation
properties.description: References to supporting documents and certificates

properties.name: authenticity
properties.description: Assessment of authenticity such as verified, probable, or unverified

entities.name: Claim
entities.description: A formal request for compensation under an insurance policy for loss or damage to an antique item

properties.name: claimId
properties.description: Unique identifier for the insurance claim

properties.name: claimDate
properties.description: Date when the claim was filed

properties.name: incidentDate
properties.description: Date when the loss or damage occurred

properties.name: incidentType
properties.description: Type of incident such as theft, fire, flood, or accidental damage

properties.name: claimAmount
properties.description: Amount being claimed in currency

properties.name: status
properties.description: Current status such as pending, approved, denied, or settled

properties.name: description
properties.description: Detailed description of the incident

relationships.name: Has Valuation
relationships.description: Links an antique item to its professional valuation assessments

relationships.name: Conducted By
relationships.description: Links a valuation to the qualified appraiser who performed the assessment

relationships.name: Owned By
relationships.description: Links an antique item to its current legal owner

relationships.name: Has Provenance
relationships.description: Links an antique item to its documented ownership and custody history

relationships.name: Insured Under
relationships.description: Links an antique item to the insurance policy providing coverage

relationships.name: Holds Policy
relationships.description: Links an owner to their insurance policies covering antique items

relationships.name: Filed Against
relationships.description: Links a claim to the insurance policy under which compensation is sought

relationships.name: Claim For
relationships.description: Links a claim to the specific antique item that was lost or damaged

relationships.name: Verified By
relationships.description: Links provenance documentation to the appraiser who verified its authenticity

businessRules.name: Valuation Required for Insurance
businessRules.condition: IF an AntiqueItem is insuredUnder an InsurancePolicy
businessRules.action: THEN the AntiqueItem MUST have at least one Valuation dated within the last 36 months

businessRules.name: Claim Amount Validation
businessRules.condition: IF a Claim is filed for an AntiqueItem
businessRules.action: THEN the claimAmount MUST NOT exceed the most recent Valuation replacementValue

businessRules.name: Active Policy Required for Claim
businessRules.condition: IF a Claim is filedAgainst an InsurancePolicy
businessRules.action: THEN the InsurancePolicy isActive MUST be true and incidentDate MUST fall between effectiveDate and expirationDate

businessRules.name: Appraiser Certification Required
businessRules.condition: IF a Valuation is conducted for insurance purposes
businessRules.action: THEN the Appraiser MUST have valid certifications documented

businessRules.name: Provenance Verification Recommended
businessRules.condition: IF an AntiqueItem has a marketValue exceeding 10000
businessRules.action: THEN the AntiqueItem SHOULD have Provenance with authenticity status of verified

businessRules.name: Coverage Amount Adequacy
businessRules.condition: IF an AntiqueItem is insuredUnder an InsurancePolicy
businessRules.action: THEN the InsurancePolicy coverageAmount MUST be greater than or equal to the AntiqueItem most recent replacementValue

What is the role and purpose of Valuation within this ontology?
